findings.evidence: Existing generic API is `subgroupFiberOrbitMapOfLE` at lines 84-93 and `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff` at lines 79-81; the new lemmas at lines 427-455 repeat this only for the codomain `FiberOrbitQuotient p b`/`⊤`.
findings.fix: Add general lemmas for `{H K L : Subgroup (Deck p)} (hHL : H ≤ L) (hKL : K ≤ L)`, with conclusion `subgroupFiberOrbitMapOfLE hHL ... = subgroupFiberOrbitMapOfLE hKL ... ↔ e ∈ MulAction.orbit L e'`, and derive the current full-deck versions by taking `L = ⊤` and using `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientTopEquiv`.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitMapToFiberOrbit_apply_eq_iff` and `subgroupFiberOrbitMapToFiberOrbit_eq_iff` are special cases of equality after mapping two subgroup quotients into a common supergroup quotient.

summary: The new full-deck equality criteria are useful, but they are stated only for the `⊤` target even though the surrounding API already has maps to any larger subgroup. State the common-supergroup result first and derive these as the full-deck specialization.
